title: A Resolution Approving and Adopting the Gad Focal Point System-executive Committee (GFPS-EXECOM) Resolution No. 2022-03 Dated October 11,2022, Entitled ?resolution Realigning Several Appropriations Under the Gender and Development (GAD) Fund for Cy 2022 Amounting to Two Million Four Hundred Thousand Pesos Only (PHP 2,400,000.00) and Thereafter Allocating and Approving the Same for Various Purposes.?
